name: failureiq-workspace
description: Root command launcher for FailureIQ projects

scripts.install:frontends: npm run install:fake-web-app && npm run install:dashboard
scripts.backend: powershell -Command "$env:JAVA_HOME = 'C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.3.3\jbr'; $env:Path = \"$env:JAVA_HOME\bin;$env:Path\"; & 'C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.3.3\plugins\maven\lib\maven3\bin\mvn.cmd' -f backend\pom.xml spring-boot:run"
